name: Grade 7 Mathematics — Semester 1
description: An 18-week Grade 7 pathway for proportional relationships, rational numbers, expressions, and scale drawings. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 7 knowledge and transferable skills in proportional relationships, rational numbers, expressions, and scale drawings.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.
